title: BUG #18297: Error when adding a column to a parent table with complex inheritance
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE parent (id UInt64, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE child1 AS parent ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
CREATE TABLE child2 AS child1 ENGINE = MergeTree() ORDER BY id;
ALTER TABLE parent ADD COLUMN age Int32 DEFAULT 0;
INSERT INTO parent (name, age) VALUES ('Alice', 30), ('Bob', NULL);
key_bug_features: Adding column to parent table with complex inheritance
